name: Export Product Specifics from Maropost Commerce Cloud
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In order to export the Product Specifics, you would need to use [@ebay _specifics@] field. However, this field contains information for all specifics at once.\nIn order to split the values into separate fields, you would need to set up this rule:"}]},{"type":"code_block","children":[{"type":"code_line","children":[{"text":"Generic Product Specifics Export Rule","code":true}]},{"type":"code_line","children":[{"text":"\"[%split delimiter:';' data1:'[@ebay_specifics@]'%][%param *body%][%split delimiter:':' data1:'[@data1@]'%][%param *body%][%if [@^is_field@]%][@data1@][%/if%][%if [@count@] == 0 AND [@data1@] eq 'PRODUCT_SPECIFIC_NAME'%][%set [@^is_field@] %]y[%/set%][%/if%][%if [@^is_field@] AND [@count@] == 1%][%set [@^is_field@] /%][%/if%][%/param%][%/split%][%/param%][%/split%]\"","code":true}]}],"lang":"perl"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"If you have a Product Specific called Size, then in order to export the feed you would put the title 'size' in the "},{"text":"FILE HEADER","bold":true},{"text":" section (Note: this field is exported by default via Merchandising Cloud Addon), and then set the corresponding rule for this field in "},{"text":"FILE BODY - body","bold":true},{"text":" section:"}]},{"type":"code_block","children":[{"type":"code_line","children":[{"text":"Example To Export Size Product Specific","code":true}]},{"type":"code_line","children":[{"text":"\"[%split delimiter:';' data1:'[@ebay_specifics@]'%][%param *body%][%split delimiter:':' data1:'[@data1@]'%][%param *body%][%if [@^is_size@]%][@data1@][%/if%][%if [@count@] == 0 AND [@data1@] eq 'Size'%][%set [@^is_size@] %]y[%/set%][%/if%][%if [@^is_size@] AND [@count@] == 1%][%set [@^is_size@] /%][%/if%][%/param%][%/split%][%/param%][%/split%]\"","code":true}]}],"lang":"perl"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"If you need to export multiple Product Specifics, then please use the option_list solution:"}]},{"type":"code_block","children":[{"type":"code_line","children":[{"text":"Export Multiple Product Specifics","code":true}]},{"type":"code_line","children":[{"text":"[%set [@hideme@]%][%if [@ebay_specifics@] ne ''%][%option_list values:'[@ebay_specifics@]' option_separator:';' value_separator:':'%][%param *body%][%site_value id:'[@sku@]-[@value@]' body:'[@title@]'/%][%/param%][%/option_list%][%/if%][%/set%]\"[%site_value id:'[@sku@]-Colour' type:'load' /%]\",\"[%site_value id:'[@sku@]-Size' type:'load' /%]\",\"[%site_value id:'[@sku@]-ANY_OTHER_PRODUCT_SPECIFIC' type:'load' /%]\",...","code":true}]}],"lang":"perl"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Alternatively, you can use the Product Specific id to export:"}]},{"type":"code_block","children":[{"type":"code_line","children":[{"text":"Export a Product Specific using a PS id"}]},{"type":"code_line","children":[{"text":"\"[%format type:'csv'%][%item_specifics id:'[@sku@]'%][%param *body%][%if [@itmspec_id@] eq 'PRODUCT_SPECIFIC_ID'%][@itmspecval_value@][%/if%][%/param%][%/item_specifics%][%/format%]\"","code":true}]}],"lang":"perl"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
